laws.title: Screen Reader Compatibility
laws.description: Ensure screen reader programs can accurately interpret and narrate page content.
laws.remediation: Implement ARIA labels and roles properly on interactive elements.

laws.title: Keyboard Navigation
laws.description: All website functions should be operable via keyboard for users with accessibility needs.
laws.remediation: Provide focus styles and ensure all interactive elements are focusable.

laws.title: Video Subtitles and Captions
laws.description: Subtitles and captions should be available for all video content for users with hearing impairments.
laws.remediation: Integrate timely and accurately synced captions with video content.

laws.title: Color Blindness Accessibility
laws.description: Site should be navigable by users with color vision deficiency.
laws.remediation: Use textures and patterns in addition to color to convey information.

laws.title: Text Resizing
laws.description: Text should be resizable without disrupting site layout to accommodate users with visual impairments.
laws.remediation: Ensure responsive typographic scale and assess using browser zoom functions.
